title: Advanced RL Techniques Path
description: Build fluency in Advanced RL Techniques inside Reinforcement Learning by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Meta Reinforcement Learning
steps.summary: A framework for reinforcement learning that involves learning to learn It sits inside Reinforcement Learning / Advanced RL Techniques. Start after Q-Learning and Reinforcement Learning Algorithms. It opens into Deep Reinforcement Meta-Learning and Cognitive Meta-Reinforcement Learning.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: AI Policy
